description: Curated sheet-readiness corpus: synthetic (extents, sheet) PNG pairs with KNOWN expected analyse_pair verdicts, one per verdict category. This is the regression spec for the audit's verdict logic under the SHIPPING DEFAULT thresholds (Thresholds()) - not a 'view=sheet is ready to be the default' verdict (that needs real operator drawing evidence; see the A1a-2 DEV/V doc). Cases are mirrored as the inline source-of-truth in services/render/tests/test_sheet_readiness_audit.py; the test asserts this file and the inline list agree, so neither can drift silently.

fixture_recipe.frame: _drawing(path) - full 380x240 frame + cross-hairs; ~7064 ink px, edge_ink_fraction 0.0
fixture_recipe.crop: _drawing(path, crop=True) - tiny 60x60 box; ~912 ink px (over-crop: retains ~0.13 of frame ink)
fixture_recipe.edge: _drawing(path, edge_touch=True) - frame + a line riding the top image edge; edge_ink_fraction ~0.056 (in the review band 0.020..0.060)

cases.name: clean_sheet
cases.rationale: sheet retains ~all extents ink, no edge contact, frame detected -> pass

cases.name: edge_touch
cases.rationale: edge_ink_fraction ~0.056 in (edge_review 0.020, edge_fail 0.060] -> review (NET-NEW coverage: existing tests only assert this stat, never the verdict)

cases.name: no_frame_fallback
cases.rationale: no sheet frame detected; detector fell back to extents -> review even though pixels look clean
